name: Bonolenov Ndongo
alt_names: ボノレノフ゠ンドンゴ
description: Bonolenov is member number 13 of the Phantom Troupe. He dresses partially in rags and looks like a mummy. During the Yorknew City arc, his appearance was insignificant. During the Chimera Ant arc, he was seen fighting with the rest of the Phantom Troupe against the Chimera ants. Very little is known about his personality and reasons for joining the Troupe, but in the fight with the Chimera ants he displays a mocking and confident attitude.
